reviews.review_description:
This game is truly amazing, taking to npc's, the graphics are good as hell the voice acting puts you right in the game, totally immersion, it's not other game like this in the Meta store, this needs a sequel ASAP

This is the kind of game you must have in your vr library, no flaws I hated at took me this long to get this game 

This vr game is truly a work of art, the voice acting and story will have you wanting more and it's several endings 

The choices you make will determine your fate and the totally outcome of the story 

My advice is to purchase this game you won't regret it

reviews.review_title: I'm loving the game so far
reviews.review_description: I wonder if you could add a romance option for bishop for one of the girls I'd read lots of romance one of the girls would be like in mass effects
Playing on the Q3 in the missile defense part... Nothing happens, none of the buttons work do anything. The game has an interesting premise but needs a lot more polish.

developer_response.body: Hi there:  We are genuinely saddened that you encountered this issue - if you were able to explain more about what happened in an email to "support@interdimensionalgames.com" that would be wonderful, and we'll work on a fix asap.  Does nothing happen as soon as you start missile defense? Do planes attack?  You should just be able to aim and press the controller triggers with both hands to either launch missiles at planes (once locked on) or fire lasers at incoming missiles.

reviews.review_title: Great Story That Really Draws You In
reviews.review_description: The story is excellent, and I am highly interested in the mystery surrounding the ship. Overall, a very well-made game in my opinion.

unaware that this was a VR version of what looks like a good title, I had given several chances for this game to "work correctly". Meaning there were parts at the beginning I didn't know if it was the story or a glitch. The first update seems like it was a glitch. I guess as an older guy I would like a tutorial or a quick guide on that wrist thingy 👍.  (That's why there is a training room, silly me!) I still want to see where the story goes!
